titleStmt.title: SII 7.439: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 439. (A.R. No. 226 of 1901). ON THE NORTH, WEST AND SOUTH WALLS OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE IN THE KADAMBANATHESVARA TEMPLE AT KADAMBARKOYIL, SAME TALUK AND DISTRICT.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tiruvaḷar tiraḷpuyat tiṟunilavalaiya n=ta ṉ ma maṇikkoṟṟa veṇkuṭai niḻal kuvalaiyat tuyirkaḷaip peṟṟatāyiṉum peṇi maṟṟuḷa Aṟaikaḻa laraicar taṉ naṭiniḻa lotuṅka Uṟaipila virai malar cūṭa teriyal vikkalaṉṟaṉnoṭu varicilait taṭakkai mācāman=ta raik kaṅkapāṭik kaḷattiṭainiṉṟu n tuṅkapattirai pukat turatti viṭṭa tāṅkarum peruvalit taṇṭu keṭat tākki mātaṇṭanāya
kaṉ cāmuṇṭarācaṉai(caṉai)c ceṟṟavaṉ cirattiṉai yaṟu yaṉ tevi nākalaiyeṉṉuṉ tokaiyañcāyalai mukattoṭu mūkku veṟākkip pakaittetir mūṉṟām vicaiyiṉu paripava n=ti rvateṉak karuti porupuṉaṟ kūṭalcaṅkamat tāhavamallaṉ makkaḷākiya vikkaṇan ciṅkaṇane n=ta rai veṉṟaṭu tūci muṉviṭṭut taṉṟuṇai main=ta
run tānum pinnaṭut tirun tu vaṭakaṭalena vakutta vattā(ṉai)naiyaik kaṭakka lai ciṅkaṉaik koṭipaṭai munnar tūci veṅkaḷiṟṟoṭu n tuṇittuk kecava(t)taṇṭanāyakaṉ tāṟkettaraiyan tiṇṭiṟal mārāyan ciṉappo pāṟkotai muvetti yeṉ ṟāttaṭu tuppi laneka cāman=ta raic ciṉnapiṉnañ ceytu piṉnavar mutaliyāṉa mutuvaṇa noṭa vi laḻintu ciṅkaṇa ṉoṭa Aṇṇalar mutaliṉa raṉaivarum Amarporp pa
ṇṇip pakaṭiḻiṉ toṭa naṇṇiya vāha vamallatu mavarkku muṉ noṭat ta kai koṇṭu Āṅkavar tāramu mavar kulataṉamuñ caṅkun toṅkalu ntā raiyum be riyum melakaṭampamum veṇcāmaraiyum cūkarakkoṭiyum makaratoraṇa namum puṭpakapiṭiyum porukaḷiṟ ṟiṭṭamum pāyparit tokaiyoṭum paṟittuc ceyoḷi vīraciṅkācaṉam pārtoḻa veṟi Eḻiltaru makuṭam veyn tu kucaikoḷ(t) tattumāpuravip pottappive
kovirājakesarivanmarā ṉa Uṭaiyār śrīvirarājentra vatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattuk kāliyūrkkoṭṭattup pulivalanāṭṭu veṇkaṟceri Uṭaiyar tirukkaṭampan tuṟai Uṭaiyār Ādidāsaśaṇḍeśvara rpakkal nāṅkaḷ poṉkoṇ llai pakiṭikku meṟkun teṉpāṟkellai
Ivvūrar Itde varkku viṭṭa tiruvamurtupaṭṭikku vaṭakku lamāṉa kollainilattukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai pakiṭikkey pāyn=ta Ūṟṟukkālukku teṟku ru makappaṭṭa nīrnilamuṅ kollainilamum patinaṟucāṇ kolāṟ kuḻi Āyirattirunūṟu kāciriyamuṅ kiṇaṟum meṟku vāṇiyaneri
niṉṟum Innilattukku nīrkkiyn=ta vaṇṇam pati lāka kolkalam vāykkāl kalli nīrpāyap peṟuvatākavum Ipparicu Emmi lic[ Ai n=ta] tirukku Ādidāsaśaṇḍeśva rarpakkal Araiyan ceyyapātamāṉa Ilāṟaiyaṉ Oṭukkiṉa te ṟpatiṉkaḻañcu Ippoṉ(p) patiṉkaḻa
ñcum Ivvūrome yuṟakkoṇṭu nokkivan=ta cittāyam pañcavā
ram nīrvilai(y) maṟṟu ttirukko perppaṭṭa Iṟaiyum I
vvūroṭum Iṟukkakkaṭave kr (ai)yadravya mum Iṟai
ttiraviyamum Aṟakkoṇ Iṟaiyiliyāka Oru kā
lāvatu mirukālaāvatu muk Idharmmam cantrādi ttavaṟ muṉ
pu niṉṟa Ūrome nilainiṟuttakkaṭa� śva rare nittaṅ kuṉṟip poṉ maṉṟap
peṟuvatākavum maṉṟupāṭu Iṟuttum Idharmma tukku vi vāṉ kaṅ
kaiyiṭaik kumariyiṭaip pāpañ ce Oṭṭit tirukkaṭampa- n tuṟai
Uṭaiyār Ādidāsaśaṇḍe ceytukuṭuttom pulivalanā
ṭṭu veṇkaṟceri Ūrom kaṟal pūti Ātittaṉ
veṅkaṭatti neḻuttu . Ippaṭi caṉ poṉ ṟa neḻuttu . Ippa
ṭi viṟṟukkuṭutteṉ neyyaāṟṟuppākka Ippaṭi viṟṟukkuṭutten kuḷattu
ḻān cen=ta ṉ perumā neḻuttu . Ippaṭi viṟ kka neḻuttu . Ippaṭi viṟṟukkuṭutte
ṉ Araiyan ceyyapātamāṉa Iṟai
Digital edition of SII 7.439 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
